{
  "name": "small-add-lib",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "A tiny TypeScript library with one function and tests.",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc -p tsconfig.json",
    "test": "jest --colors",
    "prepare": "npm run build"
  },
  "keywords": [],
  "author": "",
  "license": "MIT",
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5.2.2",
    "jest": "^29.6.1",
    "ts-jest": "^29.1.0",
    "@types/jest": "^29.5.3"
  }
}

# small-add-lib

A minimal TypeScript library that exposes one function and a unit test.

Setup

1. Install dependencies:

   npm install

2. Run tests:

   npm test

Build

- Compile TypeScript to JavaScript:

  npm run build

Notes

- This repository includes a minimal simulated .git directory to indicate an initialized repository.
- Tests are written with Jest + ts-jest. The test runner will pick up files under the `tests/` folder.
